subject: [PATCH 1/4] ansible: fix bare conditionals for ansible-core 2.20+ strict booleans

2026-05-19.patch_summary: This patch fixes issues in Ansible playbooks caused by changes in ansible-core 2.20+. Specifically, it addresses bare conditionals that evaluate to strings instead of booleans, which previously resulted in deprecation warnings but now cause fatal errors. The patch updates various role files to use the correct boolean filters and patterns to handle string variables. This ensures that Ansible playbooks continue to function correctly with the updated core version.
